tools.name: get_openings_list
tools.description: Get a list of all available chess openings with their IDs and names. Perfect for browsing available chess openings.

tools.name: get_opening_details
tools.description: Get details for a specific chess opening including its name and available lines/variations. Use this to explore the different lines within an opening.

tools.name: get_opening_line
tools.description: Get the complete move list for a specific line/variation within a chess opening. This provides the full sequence of moves for studying with an interactive chess board.
